message:
fix(gateway): add Slack text length limits for button and section content

- Add SLACK_BUTTON_TEXT_MAX_LENGTH (75 chars) for action button labels
- Add SLACK_SECTION_TEXT_MAX_LENGTH (3000 chars) for body text
- Prevents Slack API rejection for long content

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
